name: Storytelling
description: Hook → Problem → Solution → Benefits → CTA. Classic narrative arc.

structure.label: Hook
structure.hint: Bold statement or question that stops the scroll

structure.label: Problem
structure.hint: Pain point the audience relates to

structure.label: Solution
structure.hint: Introduce the product as the answer

structure.label: Benefits
structure.hint: Key benefits with social proof or stats

structure.label: CTA
structure.hint: Clear call to action with urgency

name: Educational / Tips
description: Title slide + 3-4 tips/facts + CTA. Shareable value-first content.

structure.label: Title
structure.hint: Bold title: '5 Things You Didn't Know About...'

structure.label: Tip 1
structure.hint: First tip or fact with visual

name: Before / After
description: Problem state → Transformation → Result. Visual proof of change.

name: Product Showcase
description: Hero shot + feature details + lifestyle + social proof + CTA.

structure.label: Feature 1
structure.hint: Key feature close-up with benefit text

name: Testimonial Series
description: Hook headline + 3 customer reviews + product CTA. Pure social proof.

name: Listicle / Reasons Why
description: Title + numbered reasons + CTA. 'X reasons to try...' format.

name: Myth Busting
description: Common myths vs reality. Educational + persuasive.

name: How To / Step-by-Step
description: Title + step 1-3 + result. Tutorial format that educates and sells.

structure.label: Step 1
structure.hint: First step with product in use
